examples: After a long train ride, little food and days of forced marching, he arrived at his assigned stalag.
He escaped from Stalag Luft 3 POW camp in Poland and was rounded up by the Russian forces when hostilities ceased.
Acevedo was initially taken to a prison camp known as Stalag IX-B in Bad Orb, Germany, where thousands of American, French, Italian and Russian soldiers were held as prisoners of war.
